key_facts: 50% of organizations deploying AI agents in multi-stage workflows as of 2026
79% of enterprises face challenges in AI adoption — ROI measurement cited by 54% of C-suite as top barrier
4 major trends: Sovereign AI, Agentic AI (MCP/A2A), Edge AI, AI Factory platforms
Domain-specific foundation models accelerating replacement of general-purpose LLMs
Enterprise AI shifting from pilot to production: strategic integration phase
